data.title: Aurinia Pharmaceuticals to Acquire Kezar, Expanding Autoimmune Pipeline
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Aurinia Pharmaceuticals ( (AUPH) ) just unveiled an update.

On March 30, 2026, Aurinia Pharma U.S., Inc. agreed to acquire Kezar Life Sciences via a tender offer at $6.955 in cash per share plus a non‑transferable contingent value right. The CVR will entitle Kezar shareholders to potential additional cash tied to zetomipzomib’s development or disposition, proceeds from Kezar’s Everest and Enodia deals, and Kezar’s closing net cash above $50 million, net of certain post‑closing CVR costs.

Under the merger agreement, Aurinia must launch the tender offer by April 13, 2026, keep it open for 20 business days, and then complete a follow‑on merger that will make Kezar a wholly owned subsidiary if customary conditions are met. The deal, unanimously approved by Kezar’s board after a strategic review and backed by Tang Capital’s 9% tender commitment, is expected to close in the second quarter of 2026 and would expand Aurinia’s autoimmune pipeline with the first‑in‑class candidate zetomipzomib.

The most recent analyst rating on (AUPH) stock is a Hold with a $15.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Aurinia Pharmaceuticals stock, see the AUPH Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AUPH Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AUPH is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by the improved fundamentals (revenue scale-up, strong cash generation, and low leverage) and a generally positive earnings call with double-digit 2026 growth guidance. These strengths are tempered by weak technical signals and uncertainties around the sustainability of reported profitability given the material one-time tax benefits, alongside competitive and regulatory risks.

To see Spark’s full report on AUPH stock, click here.

More about Aurinia Pharmaceuticals

Aurinia Pharmaceuticals Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on therapies for autoimmune diseases with high unmet medical needs. It markets LUPKYNIS, the first FDA‑approved oral therapy for adult patients with active lupus nephritis, and is developing aritinercept, a dual BAFF/APRIL inhibitor for potential use across autoimmune indications.

Kezar Life Sciences Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company developing novel small‑molecule therapeutics for immune‑mediated diseases and oncology. Its lead candidate, zetomipzomib, a selective immunoproteasome inhibitor, is being evaluated for autoimmune hepatitis and has potential applications in other chronic immune‑mediated disorders.

Average Trading Volume: 1,068,574

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $2.08B

For an in-depth examination of AUPH stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: Firefly Aerospace Expands Revolving Credit Facility and Liquidity
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

New trading tool for FLY bulls

The latest update is out from Firefly Aerospace, Inc. ( (FLY) ).

On April 3, 2026, Firefly Aerospace, Inc. amended its existing credit agreement, expanding its senior secured revolving credit facility by $45 million to a total of $305 million while raising the interest spread by 0.25%, with borrowings now priced off term SOFR plus 3.25% or an alternative base rate plus 2.25%. The amendment removed a minimum free cash flow covenant, tightened the minimum liquidity requirement to $381.25 million tested monthly, and left in place customary restrictions on additional debt, liens, investments, asset sales, dividends, and mergers, indicating a larger but more tightly governed liquidity framework for the company.

On April 2, 2026, board member Marc Weiser resigned from Firefly’s board of directors, with the company stating his departure was not due to any disagreement with management or operations. The board also scheduled Firefly’s first annual meeting of stockholders for June 4, 2026, and set an April 13, 2026 deadline for shareholders to submit proposals or director nominations, underscoring a key step in establishing its public-company governance practices.

The most recent analyst rating on (FLY) stock is a Hold with a $33.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Firefly Aerospace, Inc. stock, see the FLY Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on FLY Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, FLY is a Neutral.

The score reflects a mix of improving fundamentals and strong forward-looking momentum: revenue growth, positive gross profit, and a healthier equity position are supportive, and technical indicators show bullish price momentum. The main constraints are ongoing large losses and heavy cash burn (with rising debt), while valuation is less supportive due to negative earnings despite upbeat 2026 guidance and backlog visibility.

To see Spark’s full report on FLY stock, click here.

More about Firefly Aerospace, Inc.

Firefly Aerospace, Inc. operates in the space and aerospace industry, focusing on launch services and related space transportation solutions. The company targets government, commercial, and defense customers that require reliable access to orbit and space infrastructure, positioning itself as a competitor in the growing private spaceflight and satellite deployment market.

Average Trading Volume: 4,254,941

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $5.27B

An announcement from Battalion Oil ( (BATL) ) is now available.

On March 30, 2026, Battalion Oil director David Chang notified the board of his decision to resign, including from his role as chairman of the compensation committee and as a member of the reserves committee, effective March 31, 2026. In his resignation letter, Chang said his departure and decision not to stand for re-election were not due to any disagreement with the company or its subsidiaries on operations, policies, or practices.

Effective March 31, 2026, director Ajay Jegadeesan also resigned from the board and from the reserves and nominating and corporate governance committees, likewise stating his move was not prompted by any dispute with Battalion Oil. The board thanked both men for their service, reduced its size to four members, and began evaluating independent director candidates to replace the departing affiliated directors and strengthen board independence and governance.

data.title: NeuroOne Shareholders Approve Equity Plan and Reverse Split
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from NeuroOne Medical Technologies ( (NMTC) ).

On February 25, 2026, NeuroOne Medical Technologies’ board adopted, and on April 3, 2026, shareholders approved, an amendment to the company’s 2025 Equity Incentive Plan that immediately adds 1,500,000 shares to the pool and establishes an annual increase from 2027 through 2031 of up to 5% of fully diluted shares, subject to board discretion. The changes expand the company’s capacity to grant equity awards, potentially enhancing its ability to recruit and retain talent but also increasing potential dilution for existing shareholders.

At the April 3, 2026 annual meeting, shareholders elected two Class III directors to serve until 2029, ratified Baker Tilly US, LLP as auditor for the fiscal year ending September 30, 2026, and approved an amendment to permit a reverse stock split at a ratio between 1-for-2 and 1-for-15 at the board’s discretion. Stockholders also authorized possible adjournments to secure sufficient votes on the reverse split measure and formally approved the amendment to the 2025 Equity Incentive Plan, underscoring support for both capital structure flexibility and expanded equity-based compensation.

The most recent analyst rating on (NMTC) stock is a Hold with a $0.77 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on NeuroOne Medical Technologies stock, see the NMTC Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NMTC is a Neutral.

The score is constrained mainly by persistent losses and significant cash burn despite improving gross margins, creating ongoing runway/dilution risk. This is partially offset by reiterated FY2026 revenue guidance and operational/clinical progress highlighted on the earnings call, but near-term liquidity and profitability remain key overhangs.

The company targets markets that require advanced diagnostic and therapeutic solutions for brain-related disorders, positioning itself as a player in high-growth segments of the neuromodulation and neurosurgical device industry.

An update from NetClass Technology Inc Class A ( (NTCL) ) is now available.

On March 18, 2026, NetClass Technology Inc. entered into a standstill agreement with a prior accredited investor noteholder, paying an aggregate $268,518.81 so that the investor would temporarily refrain from converting a $2.2 million convertible promissory note and from selling or transferring 1,069,500 previously issued Class A ordinary shares. This move manages potential dilution and share overhang, offering near-term stability in the company’s capital structure.

On March 25, 2026, the company raised $6 million in gross proceeds through a private placement of 27,027,015 Class A ordinary shares at $0.222 per share to certain investors, engaging Revere Securities, LLC as exclusive placement agent on a fee and right-of-first-refusal basis. The offering, which has closed, directs part of the proceeds to satisfy the standstill payments, with the balance for working capital and general corporate purposes, underscoring NetClass Technology’s ongoing reliance on equity financing and its efforts to strengthen liquidity while maintaining access to future capital markets transactions.

The most recent analyst rating on (NTCL) stock is a Hold with a $0.46 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on NetClass Technology Inc Class A stock, see the NTCL Stock Forecast page.

data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Mobix Labs ( (MOBX) ) has issued an announcement.

On March 31, 2026, Mobix Labs, Inc. entered into a securities purchase agreement with Leviston Resources, LLC under which Leviston bought a senior secured convertible promissory note with a $3,000,000 principal amount for $2,550,000, bearing 10% annual interest from the issue date and maturing on July 31, 2026, with default amounts increasing to 125% of obligations. The note is convertible at Leviston’s option into Class A common stock at a price tied to either the March 31, 2026 closing price or 85% of the lowest recent 8-day VWAP, and Mobix Labs agreed under a registration rights agreement to file and secure effectiveness of a registration statement for resale of the conversion shares within set deadlines, signaling a near-term, potentially dilutive financing to bolster liquidity while giving the investor flexible exit options through the public market.

The financing on March 31, 2026 reflects Mobix Labs’ use of discounted, secured convertible debt to access capital quickly while sharing upside with Leviston through equity conversion rights. By committing to register the underlying shares for resale, the company facilitates liquidity for the investor and underscores its reliance on capital markets structures that may affect future share supply and ownership dynamics.

The most recent analyst rating on (MOBX) stock is a Hold with a $0.27 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Mobix Labs stock, see the MOBX Stock Forecast page.

data.title: BK Technologies Outlines Vision 2030 Growth Strategy
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from BK Technologies ( (BKTI) ).

On April 2, 2026, BK Technologies’ management used its Vision 2030 Investor Day to outline how heavy R&D investment in its BKR5000 and BKR9000 radios helped double revenue from $44 million to $86 million between 2020 and 2025, while an asset-light model lifted gross margins to about 50% and expanded EBITDA margins to more than 20%. Looking ahead, the company is targeting $170 million in revenue, 60% gross margins and 35% EBITDA margins by 2030, supported by the planned 2027 launch of its BKR9500 multiband mobile, continued engineering spend on its BKR X next-generation platform, and deeper penetration of the fast-growing, price-sensitive public safety LMR market, where its strong brand recognition among fire and Tier 3 agencies is already driving share gains.

Management also emphasized that existing customer wins, such as Florida Forestry and Washington County Sheriff’s Office in Idaho, validate demand for higher-priced multiband radios that solve interoperability and coverage challenges. These examples highlight BK’s strategic shift beyond its traditional wildland niche toward broader state and local public safety customers, suggesting a path to sustained market share expansion and significant free cash flow generation to fund new products and potential market entries.

The most recent analyst rating on (BKTI) stock is a Hold with a $91.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on BK Technologies stock, see the BKTI Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BKTI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BKTI is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by strong financial performance (margin expansion, strong cash generation, and a low-debt balance sheet) and supportive forward guidance from the latest call. Offsetting factors are weaker near-term technical momentum (negative MACD and sub-50 RSI) and only moderate valuation support given the P/E and no dividend yield provided.

To see Spark’s full report on BKTI stock, click here.

More about BK Technologies

BK Technologies Corporation is a long-established designer, manufacturer and marketer of Land Mobile Radios used primarily in public safety communications. The company historically focused on the wildland fire market, where it holds about 90% share, and is now targeting the broader North American public safety segment with its BKR Series portable and mobile P25 radios and related solutions.

Tamboran Resources Corporation ( (TBN) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On March 30, 2026, Tamboran Resources’ subsidiary Tamboran (Beetaloo) Pty Limited agreed a farm-in deal with Daly Waters Energy, owned by Formentera Partners, covering about 10,000 acres across the Shenandoah North and South pilot areas and the Beetaloo Central Development Area in the Beetaloo Basin. The transaction, announced on March 31, 2026, gives Daly Waters Energy a staged earn-in of up to US$28.5 million via work-program carries, including up to US$23.2 million across two phases and an additional milestone carry of up to US$5.3 million.

The deal, aligned with Daly Waters Energy’s joint venture with Japan’s INPEX, brings a major LNG operator into Tamboran’s acreage and is positioned as a value-accretive step toward Beetaloo gas commercialisation. Tamboran emphasised that the farm-out validates a premium valuation for its maturing Beetaloo acreage, allows accelerated activity while preserving its balance sheet and operatorship in core assets, supports local jobs and energy security, and remains contingent on completion of its Falcon Oil & Gas acquisition and certain JV-related conditions.

Kinetik ( (KNTK) ) has issued an update.

On March 31, 2026, Kinetik Holdings LP amended its accounts receivable securitization facility, extending the scheduled termination date of the program to March 30, 2027 and maintaining PNC Bank, National Association, as administrative agent. The amendment reduced the facility limit to $225 million while introducing an option for Kinetik’s receivables subsidiary to request an increase up to $275 million, providing greater flexibility in managing liquidity and funding its operations over the extended term.

The changes are expected to fine-tune Kinetik’s balance between committed borrowing capacity and cost of capital, as the slightly lower base facility size may reduce unused commitment costs while the upsizing feature preserves access to additional funding if needed. For stakeholders, this updated structure signals continued support from Kinetik’s banking partners and reinforces the company’s ability to monetize receivables as a tool for working capital and ongoing operational resilience.

Curaleaf Holdings ( (TSE:CURA) ) has issued an announcement.

Curaleaf Holdings said on April 2, 2026, that Chief Legal Officer Peter Clateman has extended an automatic securities disposition plan, effective March 31, 2026, to manage the orderly exercise of vested stock options expiring in July 2027. The plan provides for the sale of a portion of his subordinate voting shares at prevailing market prices to cover anticipated taxes, with trades to be executed by an independent broker between around July 1, 2026 and year-end under pre-set trading parameters and reported through standard Canadian securities disclosure systems.

The company emphasized that the ASDP was approved by its compensation committee before a blackout period and includes meaningful limits on Clateman’s ability to amend, suspend or terminate it. By disclosing the ASDP in line with Canadian regulatory guidance, Curaleaf aims to enhance transparency around insider share dispositions, which may help reassure investors that upcoming executive share sales are pre-planned and not driven by undisclosed corporate developments.

data.title: U-BX Technology Reports Sharp Revenue and Margin Declines in H2 2025 Filing
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from U-BX Technology Ltd. ( (UBXG) ).

On April 3, 2025, U-BX Technology Ltd. filed a Form 6-K for April 2026, providing an operating and financial review alongside unaudited consolidated financial statements for the six months ended December 31, 2025 and 2024. The filing shows that revenue fell 33% to $11.65 million over the period, while gross profit dropped 86% to $29,962 as cost of revenue nearly equaled sales.

Management highlights that performance remains sensitive to China’s economic conditions, regulatory changes affecting the insurance and cloud communications sectors, and competition in insurance technology services. The company is focusing on acquiring new institutional customers, deepening relationships with existing insurers, and pursuing strategic investments and acquisitions to strengthen its technology capabilities and market position despite recent margin pressure.

More about U-BX Technology Ltd.

U-BX Technology Ltd., incorporated in the Cayman Islands in 2021, operates through subsidiaries in Beijing, Suzhou and Jiangsu, providing AI-driven value-added services to China’s insurance industry. Its core offerings include digital promotion for insurers and brokers, algorithm-based auto insurance risk assessment via its “Magic Mirror” model, and bundled customer benefits such as car wash and maintenance plans.

The company serves more than 300 city-level property and auto insurance carriers nationwide, including major players such as PICC, China Pacific Property Insurance and China Life Property Insurance. It also distributes insurance-related content to consumers through mini-apps on social media platforms to build brand awareness and support brokers.

data.title: Citigroup Restructures Segment Reporting and Capital Allocation
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Citigroup ( (C) ) has provided an update.

Citigroup has reorganized its segment reporting for the first quarter of 2026, moving its Retail Banking business out of U.S. Personal Banking and into the Wealth segment, while consolidating the remaining U.S. Personal Banking operations into a new U.S. Consumer Cards segment. As part of this shift, the financial results, balance sheet and tangible common equity of the Retail Banking business have been reassigned to Wealth, and prior-period figures have been recast to maintain comparability.

In parallel, Citi revised its internal tangible common equity allocation methodology among its Services, Markets and Banking segments in the first quarter of 2026 to better match capital usage with the shared economics of corporate lending across these businesses. The change increases TCE and revenues for Services and Markets, reduces both for Banking, eliminates a legacy corporate lending revenue share line and leaves the firm’s consolidated results and overall TCE unchanged for all periods presented.

The most recent analyst rating on (C) stock is a Buy with a $146.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Citigroup stock, see the C Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, C is a Neutral.

Overall score reflects mixed financial performance led by weak recent cash-flow consistency and higher leverage, partially offset by a constructive earnings-call outlook (NII growth, efficiency improvements, ROTCE targets and buybacks). Technicals are broadly neutral and valuation is reasonable with a moderate dividend yield; corporate events add only minor, mixed impact.

More about Citigroup

Citigroup Inc. is a global diversified financial services firm that operates across consumer banking, wealth management and institutional businesses, including services, markets and banking.
